title: HG Hygienic Fridge Cleaner, Interior Refrigerator Cleanser & Odour Neutraliser, for Streak Free Shine with No Residue – 500ml Spray (335050106)
features: HG Hygienic Fridge Cleaner: Clean the inside of any fridge fast, for a shiny finish with no streaks, using this special fridge cleaning spray. The ideal glass cleaner or interior fridge wall cleaner
No rinse formula: The easy to use spray acts as a food stain remover and refrigerator deodorant, leaving surfaces clean and freshly scented. Removes stubborn grime and spills for a hygienic clean
Safe to use in food storage: Fast drying and fast acting. Do not spray onto food or vents. Can be used to clean the interior and exterior of your fridge, leaving a streak-free finish inside and out
Easy to use: Simply empty the fridge, spray the surfaces and wipe away with a clean cloth. Multi purpose refrigerator cleaner helps remove unpleasant odours inside the fridge too
Includes: 1 x HG Hygienic Fridge Cleaner, 500ml spray. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including HG kitchen cleaner, hob cleaner spray and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG’s Hygienic Fridge Cleaner is an effective and easy to use refrigerator cleaner that keeps the inside and outside of any fridge clean and smelling fresh. This fast-drying, deodorising fridge cleaning spray is ideal for cleaning plastic and glass shelves, interior walls and the exterior doors of your fridge. It doesn’t need rinsing, and it rapidly and safely removes stubborn grease, grime and food residue left in your fridge. Limit the risk of food contamination by cleaning your fridge regularly, using this refreshing and simple to use spray, which leaves a beautiful shine with no streaks. Includes: 1 x HG Hygienic Fridge Cleaner (500ml) How to use: 1. Empty the fridge 2. Spray the surface 3. Wipe away dirt with a clean cloth and rub the surface dry (no need to rinse) 4. On stubborn or dried-in dirt, leave the liquid to absorb for a few minutes Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist household cleaning products, including multi-purpose cleaners, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Box Contains 1 x HG Hygienic fridge cleaner
